title: Where Is Current Research on Blockchain Technology?—A Systematic Review
description: A comprehensive systematic review of current research on blockchain technology, exploring various aspects and applications.
content:
Where Is Current Research on Blockchain Technology?—A Systematic Review

There are different articles about blockchain technology. The one I prefer is called "Where Is Current Research on Blockchain Technology?—A Systematic Review".

You can find it here: Where Is Current Research on Blockchain Technology?—A Systematic Review
